prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第46名，2025年第46名，2024年第43名，近年排名稳定在40–46区间，属于中上游211院 校，办学实力和品牌认可度较高；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（校园安全事件），抖音热度排名第46位（较热），整体曝光度中等偏上；历史投档异常记录中未见 苏州大学有明显断档信号，报考心理受负面舆情影响有限；第五轮学科评估中，苏州大学拥有体育学A-、药学A-两个A-级学科；招生专业中临床医学、计算机科 学与技术、电子信息类、电气工程等均为社会热门方向，学科实力与专业热度匹配度较好。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电 气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）等工科专业持续高热；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34032人（+19.7%），考生规模显著扩 大，竞争加剧；苏州大学位于江苏省苏州市，属长三角发达地区，对陕西考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在陕西招生占比约1.4%–1 .8%（2024年11人/759人），属省外招生中等水平，无明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9716名、2026年小幅扩招约6.25%、陕西省物理类考生大幅增加约19.7%（竞争加剧）以及工科专业持续高热（报考热度不减）等多重因素，预计2026年苏州大学在陕西物理类最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移 。预测最低位次约10130名，区间9630–10630名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings of Soochow University in Shaanxi Science/Physics Category were approximately 12281 → 19107 → 9434 → 7819 → 9716, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing then increasing. From 2021 to 2022, the ranking significantly dropped by about 6826 places, from 2023 to 2024 it clearly moved up to 7819, and in 2025 it slightly dropped again to 9716. In recent two years, the fluctuation range is about 7800–9700, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 9716. The enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi Science/Physics Category: 34 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 30 in 2024, 32 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 34, a slight expansion of about 6.25% compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on the competition landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 46th in 2026, 46th in 2025, and 43rd in 2024, with stable rankings in the 40–46 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 institutions, with high办学 strength and brand recognition; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (campus safety incident), with a Douyin popularity ranking of 46th (relatively hot), overall exposure is moderately high; no obvious signal of score gaps in historical admission anomaly records for Soochow University, and the impact of negative public opinion on application psychology is limited; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University has two A- level disciplines: Physical Education A- and Pharmacy A-; among the enrollment majors, Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, etc., are all socially popular directions, with good alignment between discipline strength and major popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended) and other engineering majors continue to be highly popular; the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi in 2026 is about 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (+19.7%) compared to 172,468 in 2025, with a significant expansion in examinee scale, intensifying competition; Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, in the developed Yangtze River Delta region, with strong regional appeal to Shaanxi examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.4%–1.8% (11/759 in 2024), which is a moderate level for out-of-province enrollment, with no obvious changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 9716, a slight enrollment expansion of about 6.25% in 2026, a significant increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi Physics Category examinees (intensified competition), and the continued high popularity of engineering majors (undiminished application heat), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking of Soochow University in Shaanxi Physics Category in 2026 will slightly drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10130, with a range of 9630–10630.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9630–10630, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 flagship majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<9630), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) and Computer Science and Technology; if your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>10630), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a backup.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Soochow University in Shaanxi's Liberal Arts/History category were approximately 990 → 1053 → 1306 → 1689 → 1355, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2024, rankings continuously moved backward from 990 to 1689 (a cumulative backward shift of about 699 places), with a slight forward shift to 1355 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past three years is approximately between 1300 and 1700, with a baseline ranking of about 1355 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi's Liberal Arts/History category: 6 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 11 in 2024, 9 in 2025; 27 in 2026, a significant expansion of 200% compared to 2025, which will greatly increase admission opportunities but also significantly lower the minimum admission ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
Soochow University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 46th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities with high brand recognition. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (campus safety incidents), with a Douyin popularity ranking of 46th (relatively hot); no significant gap signals have been observed in historical admission anomaly records for Soochow University, and the overall admission psychology is limitedly affected by negative public opinion.

[Advantage Disciplines] In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University has two A- level disciplines: Physical Education A- and Pharmacy A-; among the history category admission majors, Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Journalism are all popular liberal arts directions, with a good match between discipline strength and major popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Law (divergence and wait-and-see), Chinese Language/Literature (recommended), Teacher Education/Education (divergence and wait-and-see) and other liberal arts majors have medium to high popularity; the number of history category examinees in Shaanxi in 2026 is about 88,500, an increase of about 12,859 (17.0%) compared to 75,641 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, in the developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has strong regional appeal to Shaanxi candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.4%–1.8%, a medium level for out-of-province enrollment, with no obvious changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1355, a significant 200% enrollment expansion in 2026, an approximately 17.0% increase in Shaanxi history category examinees (intensified competition), and medium to high popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Soochow University in Shaanxi's history category in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2951, with a range of 2508–3394.
